setting: 仕事終わりに、カフェでコーヒーを飲みながら。
lyrics:
Oh, yeah
If I could go back
Just for a night
I would see the future
And I'd make it alright
Oh, darling, if life was a movie
I'd hit rewind
Imagine if I knew how to turn back time

Imagine if I never messed up
Imagine if we never even broke up
Imagine if I had the power to control the voices in my head
And I could tell them all to shut the fuck up

Imagine if I never told a lie

Imagine if I knew how to always get it right
Imagine if I wasn't such a coward
And I had the courage hidden somewhere in my heart to look you in the eye, yeah, yeah

If I could go back (go back)
Just for a night (yeah)
I would see the future
And I'd make it alright
Oh, darling, if life was a movie
I'd hit rewind (yeah)
Imagine if I knew how to turn back time
I was thinkin' like

Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
Lost our love in the mess we made
Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
If tomorrow was yesterday

I wonder if I saw your face again
Would you be a stranger or would we be more than friends?
Would this be the beginning
Or the long and winding road that takes us all the way around until the very bitter end?

Imagine if we never felt fear
Imagine we were brave enough to never hide the tears
Imagine if I didn't have to worry about everything around me
And my sanity was actually here (yeah)

I just got so caught up in the moment
Didn't even realize we were broken

If I could go back
Just for a night
I would see the future
And I'd make it alright
Oh, darling, if life was a movie
I'd hit rewind, yeah
Imagine if I knew how to turn back time
I was thinkin' like

Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
Lost our love in the mess we made
Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
If tomorrow was yesterday
I was thinkin' like
Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
Lost our love in the mess we made
Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
If tomorrow was yesterday

Imagine what the world be like
If everybody stayed in love
If everybody stayed offline
Imagine what the world be like
Imagine what the world be like, yeah

Imagine what the world be like
If everybody stayed in love
If everybody stayed offline
Imagine what the world be like
Imagine what the world be like

But until then

If I could go back
Just for a night
I would see the future

And I'd make it alright
Oh, darling, if life was a movie
I'd hit rewind
Imagine if I knew how to turn back time

lyricsJa.ja: Oh, yeah
もし過去に戻れるなら
たった一晩だけでも
未来をのぞいて
全てをうまくやり直すのに

lyricsJa.en: Oh, darling, if life was a movie
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、もし人生が映画だったら
巻き戻しボタンを押すよ

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I knew how to turn back time
lyricsJa.ja: 時間を戻す方法を知っていたらと想像してみて

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I never messed up
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕が一度も失敗しなかったら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if we never even broke up
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕たちが別れさえしなかったら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I had the power to control the voices in my head
lyricsJa.ja: もし頭の中の声をコントロールする力があったなら

lyricsJa.en: And I could tell them all to shut the fuck up
lyricsJa.ja: そいつら全員に、黙れって言えたのに

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I never told a lie
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕が一度も嘘をつかなかったら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I knew how to always get it right
lyricsJa.ja: いつも正解を選ぶ方法を知っていたら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I wasn't such a coward
lyricsJa.ja: 僕がこんな臆病じゃなかったら

lyricsJa.en: And I had the courage hidden somewhere in my heart to look you in the eye, yeah, yeah
lyricsJa.ja: 君の目を見つめる勇気が心のどこかに隠されていたなら、yeah, yeah

lyricsJa.en: If I could go back (go back)
lyricsJa.ja: もし戻れるなら（戻れるなら）
たった一晩だけでも（yeah）
未来をのぞいて
全てをうまくやり直すのに

lyricsJa.en: Oh, darling, if life was a movie

Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay

lyricsJa.en: Lost our love in the mess we made
lyricsJa.ja: 自分たちが招いた混乱の中で愛を見失ってしまった
Aye-oh, aye-oh, aye, okay
もし明日が昨日だったら

lyricsJa.en: I wonder if I saw your face again
lyricsJa.ja: もしまた君の顔を見たらどうなるかな

lyricsJa.en: Would you be a stranger or would we be more than friends?
lyricsJa.ja: 君は他人のまま？それとも友達以上の関係に戻れる？
これが始まりになるのかな

lyricsJa.en: Or the long and winding road that takes us all the way around until the very bitter end?
lyricsJa.ja: それとも最悪な結末まで遠回りし続ける、長く険しい道になるのかな

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if we never felt fear
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕たちが恐怖を感じなかったら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine we were brave enough to never hide the tears
lyricsJa.ja: 涙を隠さないくらいの勇気があったなら

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I didn't have to worry about everything around me
lyricsJa.ja: 周りのことなんて何も気にしなくてよかったら

lyricsJa.en: And my sanity was actually here (yeah)
lyricsJa.ja: ちゃんと正気でいられたなら (yeah)

lyricsJa.en: I just got so caught up in the moment
lyricsJa.ja: ただ、その場の感情に流されてしまったんだ

lyricsJa.en: Didn't even realize we were broken
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちが壊れてしまったことに気づきもしなかった

たった一晩だけでも

全てをうまくやり直すのに

lyricsJa.en: Imagine if I knew how to turn back time
lyricsJa.ja: もし時間の戻し方を知っていたらと想像してみて

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Sometimes I just wish I could go back and change things, you know?
sentences.displayHtml: Sometimes I just wish I could go back and change things, you know?

conversation.japanese: 時々、過去に戻って何かを変えられたらなって思うんだよね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I often wonder what would be different if I knew how to turn back time.
sentences.displayHtml: I often wonder what would be different if I knew how to turn back time.

conversation.japanese: ああ、わかる。もし時間を戻す方法を知っていたら、何が変わっていたんだろうってよく考えるよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Like, imagine if I never messed up that big project at work.
sentences.displayHtml: Like, imagine if I never messed up that big project at work.

sentences.text: Things might be so different now.
sentences.displayHtml: Things might be so different now.

conversation.japanese: 本当に！例えば、あの大きな仕事でもし失敗していなかったらって想像するんだ。今とは全然違ったかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Imagine if we never even broke up with certain people.
sentences.displayHtml: Imagine if we never even broke up with certain people.

conversation.japanese: うん、人間関係でもそうだよね。特定の人ともし別れていなかったらってね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: And honestly, I wish I could calm the voices in my head that make me overthink everything.
sentences.displayHtml: And honestly, I wish I could calm the voices in my head that make me overthink everything.

sentences.text: Like, tell them to just shut up!
sentences.displayHtml: Like, tell them to just shut up!

conversation.japanese: 正直なところ、何でも考えすぎちゃう頭の中の声を静かにさせたいよ。もう「黙って！」って言いたい感じ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I also wish I wasn't such a coward when I should've been brave, or if I never told a lie about something important.
sentences.displayHtml: I also wish I wasn't such a coward when I should've been brave, or if I never told a lie about something important.

conversation.japanese: すごくよくわかる。僕も、勇気を出すべきときにあんなに臆病じゃなかったらとか、大切なことで嘘をつかなかったらって思うことがあるよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It's easy to dwell on the 'what ifs.
sentences.displayHtml: It's easy to dwell on the 'what ifs.

sentences.text: ' But I guess we just have to try to always get it right from now on, right?
sentences.displayHtml: ' But I guess we just have to try to always get it right from now on, right?

conversation.japanese: 「もし～だったら」って考えちゃうのは簡単だよね。でも、これからは常にうまくやるように努力するしかないのかな。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Hopefully, we can make it alright.
sentences.displayHtml: Hopefully, we can make it alright.

conversation.japanese: うん、未来に目を向けよう。きっとうまくいくさ。
